content:
# playwright-auto-wait-actionability - Overview

Automation type: browser_playwright
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Rely on Playwright auto-waiting and actionability checks instead of manual sleep-heavy automation.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/actionability

When to use:
- Clicks fail intermittently
- Page needs waiting
- Form submit or navigation is flaky

Inputs required:
- Target action
- Expected post-action state
- Timeout budget

AI summary: Use Playwright auto-waiting/actionability and auto-retrying assertions. Avoid fixed sleeps; wait for specific UI state, URL, response, or locator.

# playwright-auto-wait-actionability - Execution Steps

Automation type: browser_playwright
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Rely on Playwright auto-waiting and actionability checks instead of manual sleep-heavy automation.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/actionability

- Use locators directly; Playwright waits for visible/enabled/stable where relevant.
- Prefer auto-retrying expect assertions for final state.
- Wait for specific UI state, URL, response, or locator rather than fixed time.
- Use explicit waits only for known asynchronous boundaries.

AI summary: Use Playwright auto-waiting/actionability and auto-retrying assertions. Avoid fixed sleeps; wait for specific UI state, URL, response, or locator.

# playwright-auto-wait-actionability - Commands or APIs

Automation type: browser_playwright
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Rely on Playwright auto-waiting and actionability checks instead of manual sleep-heavy automation.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/actionability

- await locator.click()
- await expect(locator).toBeVisible()
- await expect(page).toHaveURL(...)

AI summary: Use Playwright auto-waiting/actionability and auto-retrying assertions. Avoid fixed sleeps; wait for specific UI state, URL, response, or locator.

# playwright-auto-wait-actionability - Verification

Automation type: browser_playwright
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Rely on Playwright auto-waiting and actionability checks instead of manual sleep-heavy automation.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/actionability

- No fixed sleep required
- Assertion proves expected state
- Failure message points to missing state

AI summary: Use Playwright auto-waiting/actionability and auto-retrying assertions. Avoid fixed sleeps; wait for specific UI state, URL, response, or locator.

# playwright-auto-wait-actionability - Failure Modes

Automation type: browser_playwright
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Rely on Playwright auto-waiting and actionability checks instead of manual sleep-heavy automation.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/actionability

- Element detached
- Overlay intercepts click
- Animation not settled
- Disabled button

AI summary: Use Playwright auto-waiting/actionability and auto-retrying assertions. Avoid fixed sleeps; wait for specific UI state, URL, response, or locator.

# playwright-auto-wait-actionability - Safety Notes

Automation type: browser_playwright
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Rely on Playwright auto-waiting and actionability checks instead of manual sleep-heavy automation.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/actionability

- Do not bypass actionability with force unless the task explicitly requires it and risk is low.

AI summary: Use Playwright auto-waiting/actionability and auto-retrying assertions. Avoid fixed sleeps; wait for specific UI state, URL, response, or locator.

# playwright-auto-wait-actionability - Handoff Report

Automation type: browser_playwright
Tooling: Playwright
Goal: Rely on Playwright auto-waiting and actionability checks instead of manual sleep-heavy automation.
Evidence: official / high
Source: https://playwright.dev/docs/actionability

- Action attempted
- Assertion used
- Any forced actions or waits

AI summary: Use Playwright auto-waiting/actionability and auto-retrying assertions. Avoid fixed sleeps; wait for specific UI state, URL, response, or locator.
